_comment: Product launch template — copy this file, fill in the topic fields, then run: comms-analyst-chat --prompt "$(cat your-prompt.txt)"
_usage: Or simply run: comms-analyst-chat  and choose template [1] from the menu.
_example_prompt: Track sentiment around GitHub Copilot product launch over the last 72 hours, competitors: OpenAI, GitLab, Cursor
notes: Best used 0–72 hours after a public launch or announcement.
